{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260320154606544CE94EB7532465E098\"}"},"total":24},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7600276893944857369","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，但是给章节取名会怎样？？？？？？"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769581425,"group_id":"7588435942214470681","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5RORv6la1WNODr2rkXjJS0=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776530160\u0026x-signature=vBZRQcVlb%2BMBxSNfqFj9EkeoKP4%3D","user_id":"104407575678","user_name":"番茄傻波一多"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"104407575678","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7588435942214470681","book_info":{"abstract":"程峰穿越成侦察兵，觉醒军功系统。首次签到就抽中宗师格斗术，任务竟是狙杀特种兵王！军演中，他一路开挂，埋雷淘汰狼牙，伪装潜入，竟把蓝军司令——那位军中传奇杜明恩中将给“斩首”了。事后才知，司令是他邂逅的绝美天仙杜菲菲的外公！从此，程峰在军中封神之路与天仙的“追杀”之路，齐头并进。（男主与天仙的暧昧关系核心在于：他靠实力“得罪”了她全家，却偏偏让她又恨又好奇，在一次次“追杀”与“被追杀”的顶级拉扯中，情愫暗生。）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0f21e3074dfd6202037ccf3c55e17a12","author":"秋月梨好吃嘛","author_id":"","book_id":"7588435942214470681","book_name":"特种兵：开局被杜菲菲全家通缉","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101820","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":1016,\"name\":\"男频衍生\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016\u0026name=男频衍生\u0026genre_type=0\u0
